rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.17+commit.8df45f5f"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"This is the inner message format for token transfers, embedded in MessageV2.messageBody Real CCTP V2 BurnMessage format: | Field           | Bytes | Offset | |-----------------|-------|--------| | version         | 4     | 0      | | burnToken       | 32    | 4      | | mintRecipient   | 32    | 36     | | amount          | 32    | 68     | | messageSender   | 32    | 100    | | maxFee          | 32    | 132    | | feeExecuted     | 32    | 164    | | expirationBlock | 32    | 196    | | hookData        | var   | 228    |","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"BurnMessageV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Library for encoding/decoding CCTP V2 burn messages (messageBody content)","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/cctp/ICCTPV2.sol":"BurnMessageV2"},"evmVersion":"london","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=node_modules/@openzeppelin/",":eth-gas-reporter/=node_modules/eth-gas-reporter/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":hardhat/=node_modules/hardhat/"]},"sources":{"contracts/cctp/ICCTPV2.sol":{"keccak256":"0xec090ea5bf76501313c560e3cbd84607d4c1eb8a516e935494ea7b3abb7f3338","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1159c77481997f409de88647ef1b75ffc6f90c8d6e22473d21da0a1a6735eb9c","dweb:/ipfs/QmXr3FGJ82yjiYfMcPstb83PtAZTxy6eLZekifHPyQtiae"]}},"version":1}
